name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Buffalo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>殺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ブルキ
desc: If this card is in your GY: You can send a total of 2 "Fire Fist" / "Fire Formation" cards from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your GY. You can only use the effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Buffalo" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY: You can send a total of 2 "Fire Fist" / "Fire Formation" cards from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your GY. You can only use the effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Buffalo" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY: You can send a total of 2 "Fire Fist" / "Fire Formation" cards from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your GY. You can only use the effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Buffalo" once per turn.

mentions: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Buffalo
action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
